Minor'S Compromise Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Appearances by the petitioner, minor and counsel were waived at the last calling of the case on December 2, 2008.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $163,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $54,500.00.
Costs - $3,337.08.

The net balance of $105,662.92 shall be made payable to the Hartford Insuance Company for the purchase of a structured settlement, with a lump sum payment on the minor's 25th birthday.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
